mapper.sql: select c.classroom_id, c.classroom_name, c.building_name, c.dept_id, d.dept_name, c.campus_name, c.capacity, c.room_type, c.sort_order, c.status, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark from sc_classroom c left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = c.dept_id
mapper.insert: insert into sc_classroom(classroom_name, building_name, dept_id, campus_name, capacity, room_type, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{classroomName}, #{buildingName}, #{deptId}, #{campusName}, #{capacity}, #{roomType}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_classroom classroom_name = #{classroomName},building_name = #{buildingName},dept_id = #{deptId},campus_name = #{campusName},capacity = #{capacity},room_type = #{roomType},sort_order = #{sortOrder},status = #{status},update_by = #{updateBy},remark = #{remark},update_time = sysdate() where classroom_id = #{classroomId}
